title: Murcia, Region of Murcia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Murcia, Region of Murcia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Murcia is a city in Region of Murcia with a population of 460,000. A sunny city in southeastern Spain with a beautiful Baroque cathedral, rich agricultural heritage, and affordable living.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
